VariableReference, VariableSpecification, VisibilityModifier, Volatile, While

    public interface ProgramElement
extends SourceElement, ModelElement
    A part of the program syntax that carries semantics in the model. taken from COMPOST and changed to achieve an immutable structure

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Comment[] getComments()
      Get comments.
      MatchConditions match(SourceData source, MatchConditions matchCond)
      matches the source "text" (@link SourceData#getSource()) against the pattern represented by this object.

      • Methods inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.java.SourceElement

        equalsModRenaming, getEndPosition, getFirstElement, getFirstElementIncludingBlocks, getLastElement, getPositionInfo, getRelativePosition, getStartPosition, prettyPrint, visit

    • Method Detail

      • getComments

        Comment[] getComments()
        Get comments.
        Returns:
        the comments.

      • match

        MatchConditions match(SourceData source,
                      MatchConditions matchCond)
        matches the source "text" (@link SourceData#getSource()) against the pattern represented by this object. In case of a successful match the resulting MatchConditions with the found instantiations of the schemavariables. If the match failed, null is returned instead.
        Parameters:
        source - the SourceData with the program element to match
        matchCond - the MatchConditions found up to this point
        Returns:
        the resulting match conditions or null if the match failed
